## Summary

Explain the release in one or two paragraphs. Start with the user-facing outcome.

## Highlights

- Highlight the most important shipped changes.
- Call out migrations, deprecations, or breaking changes clearly.
- Link to related docs pages or demos.

## Upgrade Notes

- Document any required action for readers.
- Mention defaults, flags, or configuration changes.
- Add follow-up links if the change spans multiple docs pages.
